column11: Includes Polaris (α UMi); part of Sh 2-178 (HII) and LBN 606; very diffuse cirrus.
Ambient Milky Way cirrus. Not NGC 2170 (Monoceros).
Patchy dust lanes north of Ursa Major.
Denser IFN region near North Celestial Pole; cluster NGC 188 at one edge.
Southern IFN near south pole; often called “South Celestial Serpent”.
